title: More Tools
description: More Tools (Beta) expands Minecraft’s tools by introducing tools and weapons made from materials like Copper, Redstone, Emerald, Lapis Lazuli, and Quartz and more.
body:
**More Tools (Beta Version)**

Enhance your gameplay with the More Tools mod! This beta version introduces an expanded toolkit, allowing for greater variety and utility. While still in development, this mod is perfect for players looking to new tools and weapons.

#

**New Tools and Weapons:** 
- Copper Pickaxe 
- Copper Sword 
- Redstone Pickaxe 
- Redstone Sword 
- Emerald Pickaxe 
- Emerald Sword 
- Lapis Lazuli Pickaxe 
- Lapis Lazuli Sword 
- Quartz Pickaxe 
- Quartz Sword 
- And others

#

**Beta Notice:**
Please note that this mod is in its _beta phase_. As such, it may contain **bugs** or **unfinished/unpolished content**. In future updates, more tools and weapons will be added to further enhance your gameplay experience.


**How to Use:**
1. Craft Your Tools: Use the standard crafting table to create the new tools and weapons using their respective materials. 

2. Try Them: Test out the unique properties and durability of these new items in your Minecraft world.


**Expand your Minecraft toolkit with More Tools (Beta Version)!**
